reviews.comment:
Lugar tranquilo para descansar y estirar las piernas para continuar viaje.
Tienen un negocio donde venden comida para llevar y artículos regionales.

(Translated by Google)
A quiet place to rest and stretch your legs before continuing your journey.
They have a shop selling takeaway food and regional products.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tadmJrUkNaWEJ3ZVVac04xTk5hVU01VDBGd1puYxAB

reviews.comment:
Siempre tiene problemas con la conexión y la app. El personal es excelente.

(Translated by Google)
There are always connection and app issues. The staff is excellent.

reviewReply.comment: Si estamos trabajando con tarjeta de crédito y débito, por el momento los pagos con la app de YPF no esta funcionando por un problema en los sistemas desde el día 1 de Diciembre. Están trabajando para solucionarlo lo antes posible. Mil disculpas.

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtel96TXlnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención. Personal muy cordial.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. Very friendly staff.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xWM2NTMURWRkp5WkUxWU9UUlFWa3RSZVVSa1FrRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención tanto para la carga de combustible como para el servicio de comida, exquisitos sandwichs gracias!!!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service both for refueling and food service; delicious sandwiches, thank you!!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pOelEzcHFXbW8yVFdGVWF6aGpWWGx2WlRac2VIYxAB

reviews.comment:
Excelentes lugar para parar en motorhome, baños limpios conexión a 220 Volt, agua duchas, descarga de aguas negras y grises, felicitaciones por la atención y el lugar 100 puntos!!!!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place to stop in a motorhome, clean bathrooms, 220 Volt connection, water, showers, black and grey water disposal. Congratulations on the service and the place – 100 points!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT213eE1IUmlaMGhZWlROaWRFNXNOMGsxTmxKaFJsRRAB

reviews.comment:
Es una parada de ruta, lugar tranquilo, para descansar, buenos sandwiches, una revisión y carga de combustible y seguir

(Translated by Google)
It's a roadside stop, a quiet place to rest, enjoy some good sandwiches, get a check-up and refuel, and then continue on.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2poR1EwMVdaeTF2U3pobVF6QkdUREJyYmxkaFUxRRAB

reviews.comment:
Estación muy tranquila, siempre descanso en este lugar cuando me toca trabajar por la zona. Muy buena atención tanto playeros como en el salón de ventas. Hermoso parque para pasear con la familia, mucha sombra y mesas para estar

(Translated by Google)
Very quiet station; I always rest here when I have to work in the area. Excellent service both at the station and in the sales area. Beautiful park for a family stroll, with plenty of shade and picnic tables.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xaTldVNVljVGhXZGkxV2JrTkVZelUzUVZONE1WRRAB

reviews.comment:
Paro siempre de camino a Cordoba, preparan unos sanguches barbaros y te atienden excelente. Cargo gasoil y el precio x lt. es mas competitivo. Sí o sí, es menester tener paciencia, acordate que estas de viaje y no es un Mcdonalds 24hs.

(Translated by Google)
I always stop there on my way to Cordoba; they make amazing sandwiches and the service is excellent. I fill up with diesel there, and the price per liter is more competitive. You definitely need to be patient; remember you're traveling, it's not a 24-hour McDonald's.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pOcVFVeENWazR6TW5oTVRWRnNRMGRqWTFOaVMzYxAB

reviews.comment:
La mejor parada. Super tranquilo y con un espacio verde para descansar en la sombra. Muy amables.

(Translated by Google)
The best stop. Super quiet and with a green space to relax in the shade. Very friendly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25oSWVYWm1YekU0YkVWNFQwVm5jVTlTWlZZMGNGRRAB

reviews.comment:
Un muy buen lugar para parar y hacer un descanso. Arboleda espectacular, con mesas y bancos

(Translated by Google)
A great place to stop and take a break. Spectacular grove with tables and benches.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21SblpGUTNTRXAxYVRVelEwNUdPVGgxU1VwMWIyYxAB

reviews.comment:
siempre paramos acá a almorzar durante en viaje cordoba/ bs as. tienen mesas , una linda arboleda y hamacas para que jueguen un poco los chicos! El mejor point sin duda.. hay que meterse 2kg adentro de la autovía pero vale la pena

(Translated by Google)
We always stop here for lunch on our Cordoba/Buenos Aires trip. They have tables, a lovely grove of trees, and swings for the kids to play on! Definitely the best spot... you have to go 2 km into the highway, but it's worth it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21SYVRqWjRTeko0TFY5WldtTkViVmhHZGpWM2NWRRAB

reviews.comment:
Gracias a estar tan cerca de
la Autopista , nos  ayudó mucho haber estado en ese momento ahí!

(Translated by Google)
Being so close to the highway helped us a lot to be there at that moment!

reviews.comment:
ideal para frenar y tirar la carpa. hay eléctricidad buenas canillas parrillas y buen pasto y sombras. ideal motoviajeros. destacó el trato de la señora que atendía adentro. muy amable.

(Translated by Google)
Ideal for stopping and pitching a tent. There's electricity, good taps, grills, and good grass and shade. Perfect for motorcycle travelers. I especially appreciated the service from the lady who worked there. Very friendly.
